children.label: A
children.text: are consistent with the State plan under ; andsection 6434(a) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: concentrate on providing participants with the knowledge and skills needed to make a successful transition to secondary school completion, career and technical education, further education, or employment.

children.label: iii
children.text: providing targeted services for youth who have come in contact with both the child welfare system and juvenile justice system;

children.label: i
children.text: except for institution-wide projects under , are provided to children and youth identified by the State agency as failing, or most at-risk of failing, to meet the challenging State academic standards;section 6436 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: respond to the educational needs of such children and youth, including by supplementing and improving the quality of the educational services provided to such children and youth by the State agency; and

children.label: iii
children.text: afford such children and youth an opportunity to meet challenging State academic standards; and

children.label: C
children.text: shall be carried out in a manner consistent with and part F (as applied to programs and projects under this part).section 6321 of this title

children.heading: Supplement, not supplant
children.label: b Supplement, not supplant
children.text: A program under this subpart that supplements the number of hours of instruction students receive from State and local sources shall be considered to comply with the supplement, not supplant requirement of (as applied to this part) without regard to the subject areas in which instruction is given during those hours.section 6321 of this title
